items.name: guizang-ppt-skill
items.description: A Claude Code Skill that turns prompts into horizontal-swipe magazine-style HTML decks — 10 layouts, 5 curated themes, WebGL hero backgrounds, single-file output.

items.name: awesome-gpt-image-2
items.description: Prompt as Code | GPT-Image2 工业级提示词引擎与模板库 - 329个案例逆向工程，13套工业级模板，且不断更新中。

items.name: deepseek_v4_rolepaly_instruct
items.description: 对于DeepSeek-V4角色扮演的特殊控制指令的说明

items.name: open-design
items.description: 🎨 Local-first open replica of Anthropic's Claude Design. ⚡ 19 Skills · ✨ 71 brand-grade Design Systems · 🖼️ sandboxed preview · 📦 HTML/PDF/PPTX export. 🤖 Runs on Claude Code / Codex / Cursor / Gemini CLI / OpenCode / Qwen.

items.name: clawsweeper
items.description: ClawSweeper scans all issues and PRs and suggest what we can close, and why. It runs every PR / Issue once a week.

items.name: agent-sprite-forge
items.description: Agent Skill for generating 2D sprite sheets and map, transparent PNG frames, and animated GIFs from prompts.

items.name: harmonist
items.description: Portable AI agent orchestration with mechanical protocol enforcement. 186 agents, zero runtime dependencies.

items.name: future-agi
items.description: Open-source, end-to-end platform for evaluating, observing, and improving LLM and AI agent applications. Tracing · Evals · Simulations · Datasets · Gateway · Guardrails. Self-hostable. Apache 2.0.

items.name: im-not-ai
items.description: AI가 쓴 글이 아닌 것처럼 윤문해주는 스킬

items.name: stash
items.description: Stash — persistent memory layer for AI agents. Episodes, facts, and working context stored in Postgres. MCP server included. Self-hosted, single binary, no cloud required.
